tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Whats Love Got To Do With It
Dream A Little Dream Of Me

content:
[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
All the men come in these places[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
 And the men are all the same[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                      [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
You don't look at their faces[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Am7[/ch]
 And you don't ask their names[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                         [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
You don't think of them as human[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
 You don't think of them at all[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                         [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
You keep your mind on the money[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Am7[/ch]
 Keeping your eyes on the wall[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]         [ch]Gsus4[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
I'm your private dancer, a dancer for money[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
I'll do what you want me to do[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]
I'm your private dancer, a dancer for money[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F#dim[/ch]              [ch]C#dim[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]
And any old music will do[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
 I want to make a million dollars[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
  I wanna live out by the sea[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                      [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
Have a husband and some children[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Am7[/ch]
 Yeah, I guess I want a family[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
All the men come in these places[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
 And the men are all the same[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                      [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
You don't look at their faces[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Am7[/ch]
 And you don't ask their names[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]         [ch]Gsus4[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
I'm your private dancer, a dancer for money[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
I'll do what you want me to do[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]
I'm your private dancer, a dancer for money[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F#dim[/ch]   [ch]B[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
And any old music will do[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I'm your private dancer, a dancer for money[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
I'll do what you want me to do[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]
I'm your private dancer, a dancer for money[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F#dim[/ch]              [ch]C#dim[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]
And any old music will do[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab][ch]A7[/ch]
 Deutch marks or dollars[/tab]
American Express will do nicely, thank you
Let me loosen up your collar
[tab]         [ch]F#[/ch]                         [ch]B[/ch]
Tell me, do you wanna see me do the shimmy again?[/tab]

[ch]Em[/ch]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Gsus4[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
I'm your private dancer, a dancer for money[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
I'll do what you want me to do[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]
I'm your private dancer, a dancer for money[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F#dim[/ch]   [ch]B[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
And any old music will do[/tab]

(repeat to fade)
